pr_title: fix: B1 step-gate, medical example, review cap, first-call retry
pr_description: Consolidates the confirmed-working changes from PRs #354-356 plus a first-call retry fix. B1 step-gate**: Scope `partial_recovery` events to `identify_potential_levers` only (confirmed working in iters 36-38) Medical example**: Replace urban-planning (Section 106) with IRB/clinical-site sequential overhead. Domains: agriculture, medical, insurance — no test-plan overlap (iter 36 showed game-dev example collides) Review length cap**: "20-40 words" in section 6 prevents haiku verbosity overflow (iter 37: EOF at 40KB from ~550 char reviews; iter 38: fixed at ~355 chars) First-call retry**: Don't raise immediately when first call fails validation. Let the adaptive loop retry — `max_calls=5` exhausts naturally. Fixes stochastic failures like llama3.1 gta_game producing 2 options on one attempt Temperature**: llama3.1 0.5→0.8 to break deterministic structured output OPTIMIZE_INSTRUCTIONS**: Document prohibition backfire and verbosity amplification Not included (confirmed harmful in iter 36): No explicit prohibition ("The options"/"The lever" — backfired for llama3.1) No game-dev example (domain collision with test plans)
